programme.title: 你比星光美丽
programme.desc: 该剧讲述了北漂女孩纪星（谭松韵饰）不甘于压抑内卷的职场生活，辞职走上艰苦创业之路，最终成功拉到投资人韩廷（许凯饰）入伙，二人在医疗与健康行业中携手共进。

programme.title: 披荆斩棘3
programme.desc: 本季节目以"奋进"为内核，不仅延续了前两季的全景竞演综艺模式，还通过赛制、环节等方面的升级再度强化节目的竞技性。嘉宾们不断挑战、探索，展现男性的奋斗精神和个性魅力。

programme.title: 以爱为营
programme.desc: 财经记者郑书意（白鹿饰）为拿下头版几经努力争取和有名的年轻霸道总裁时宴（王鹤棣饰）进行采访，两人互相留下了深刻印象。最终阴差阳错的爱情慢慢升温。

programme.title: 偶然遇见的你
programme.desc: 剧情讲述进行时空旅行寻找过去连环杀人真相的尹海俊（金东旭饰）和想要阻止父母结婚拯救妈妈的白允英（秦基周饰）因偶然相遇而受困于1987年，竟然意识到彼此目标之间有关联。

programme.title: 市井豪门
programme.desc: 一条街隔开两个世界。一边是努力生活有苦也有笑的市场人生，一边是勾心斗角有钱却战战兢兢的豪门日子。

programme.title: 亲爱的客栈2026
programme.desc: 节目以"慢下来，趣生活"为核心，经营一家有趣、好玩、有温度的年轻客栈。在经营与体验中，解锁未知惊喜，邂逅温暖故事，共赴一场关于陪伴、治愈与热爱的"趣生活"之旅。

programme.title: 长相思第一季
programme.desc: 流落大荒的皓翎王姬小夭 历经百年颠沛之苦，在清水镇成为悬壶为生的玟小六，机缘之下与玱玹, 涂山景, 相柳, 阿念, 赤水丰隆等人上演了一场亲情, 爱情, 友情的纠葛故事。

programme.title: 星空下的仁医
programme.desc: 二十年前一宗手术，令两名儿科专科实习医生况丛昕（马国明饰）与许甘枫（郑嘉颖饰）决裂。 时日过去，由于一个特殊的移植手术，他们在安妮公主医院重聚。

programme.title: 偶然遇见的你
programme.desc: 剧情讲述进行时空旅行寻找过去连环杀人真相的尹海俊（金东旭饰）和想要阻止父母结婚拯救妈妈的白允英（秦基周饰）因偶然相遇而受困于1987年，竟然意识到彼此目标之间有关联。

programme.title: 天才冲冲冲
programme.desc: 「寓教于乐」的大型综艺节目, 节目单元不仅推陈出新, 在生活中更能与三五好友, 一同尝试节目中的各项游戏, 亲身体验节目中的各项乐趣。

programme.title: 星空下的仁医
programme.desc: 二十年前一宗手术，令两名儿科专科实习医生况丛昕（马国明饰）与许甘枫（郑嘉颖饰）决裂。 时日过去，由于一个特殊的移植手术，他们在安妮公主医院重聚。

programme.title: 市井豪门
programme.desc: 一条街隔开两个世界。一边是努力生活有苦也有笑的市场人生，一边是勾心斗角有钱却战战兢兢的豪门日子。

programme.title: 长相思第一季
programme.desc: 流落大荒的皓翎王姬小夭 历经百年颠沛之苦，在清水镇成为悬壶为生的玟小六，机缘之下与玱玹, 涂山景, 相柳, 阿念, 赤水丰隆等人上演了一场亲情, 爱情, 友情的纠葛故事。

programme.title: 综艺玩很大
programme.desc: 综艺天王吴宗宪与超人气主持KID林柏升联手合作，艺人分成两队挑战各式关卡，节目充满趣味性，更借外景地点的不同，带领观众深入了解各地风土民情。

programme.title: 你比星光美丽
programme.desc: 该剧讲述了北漂女孩纪星（谭松韵饰）不甘于压抑内卷的职场生活，辞职走上艰苦创业之路，最终成功拉到投资人韩廷（许凯饰）入伙，二人在医疗与健康行业中携手共进。

programme.title: 长相思第一季
programme.desc: 流落大荒的皓翎王姬小夭 历经百年颠沛之苦，在清水镇成为悬壶为生的玟小六，机缘之下与玱玹, 涂山景, 相柳, 阿念, 赤水丰隆等人上演了一场亲情, 爱情, 友情的纠葛故事。

programme.title: 鹿鼎记
programme.desc: 韦小宝被反清复明的"天地会"被派到皇宫当卧底，受命查探四十二章经下落。韦小宝很快成为康熙皇帝的心腹，但他既要执行天地会的任务，最后陷入两难的状态。

programme.title: 惊心妒怨
programme.desc: 女模特余虹敏入住了一间公寓式医院，不久后在深夜离奇坠楼身亡。坊间开始流传该医院是「幽灵医院」。事后，余虹敏的摄影师在深夜频频接到诡异电话，撰稿人在一场离奇车祸后神志不清，而她的好友则神秘失踪...

programme.title: 武状元苏乞儿
programme.desc: 苏乞儿原为贵族，但因上京考武状元时作弊，被眨为乞儿。苏乞儿在机缘巧合下救了丐帮长老，并接任为新帮主。一天，皇上狩猎之时，差点被暗杀，幸苏乞儿及时救驾。皇帝欲恢复其官职时，苏乞儿却拒绝。其后，皇上御赐一个乞儿钵予苏乞儿，从此他过着愉快的行乞生活。

programme.title: 圣山村迷局
programme.desc: 平静的圣山村发生了一系列神秘事件，原本该下葬的尸体突然复活，而且拔足狂跑。全村马上展开追查行动，但这时村中恶霸却意外死亡，村长也失踪。于是警察接手调查，但当谜底快要解开时，村干部却又有惊天大发现。到底谁是幕后真凶？

programme.title: 歼毒先锋
programme.desc: 退役军人吴巍和卧底刑警高天明带领特别行动小组勇闯近曼谷的孤岛，从暴徒手中救出人质。但在完成任务并准备离岛之际，吴巍发现自己的女儿被对方胁持。为救女儿及将犯罪分子绳之以法，吴巍和高天明重回危险境地，与暴徒进行了惨烈的对决。

programme.title: 夜迷藏
programme.desc: 电影由三个恐怖短故事组成：一个男人收到死神通报后，设法避过死亡；男人因心爱的妻子去世后伤心欲绝，他的妻子变成鬼魂与他通灵；三兄弟在一次晚餐聚会上为照顾年迈母亲的问题而争吵，最后竟变成一宗可怕的谋杀案。

programme.title: 多乐路
programme.desc: 东北某小城，一家麻辣汤馆每天都迎来不同的客人。这些客人中有如胶似漆的小情侣，两名放荡不羁的青年和一位的士司机。他们本是毫无交集的人，却因为一场交通事故牵扯在一起...

programme.title: 靓足100分
programme.desc: 林天赐的富商祖父病重，欲将遗产留给他，但条件是天赐要在一个月内结婚，否则遗产将归祖父侄儿罗伯特。不久天赐邂逅乐小小，两人渐生情愫。罗伯特即派玛丽琳利用美人计破坏他俩的感情。不料玛丽琳贪图遗产，准备真的与林结婚。罗心有不甘，捣乱婚礼，并揭发她的计谋...

programme.title: 法中情
programme.desc: 摄影师田迪文强奸模特儿凌祖儿，幸得大律师叶颖文洗脱控罪。颖文男友高级督察方伟负责此案，不满女友是非不分。祖儿之妹凌珊珊替姐报仇，反遭田施暴，颖文再任其辩护律师。珊珊因过往不良纪录，处处失利，能够令田入罪的机会极微；检控官决定请师兄龙约翰出山相助。

programme.title: 零号追杀
programme.desc: 退出江湖的特工华叔，在老街以开古董店为生。一天，老街遭当地青龙帮强拆时，华叔隐藏的身份被暴露，并受到阿杰为首的神秘组织追杀，由此展开了一场双雄对决!

programme.title: 天官赐福
programme.desc: 康熙少年嗣位，太后急欲替他完婚，遂选纳大臣之女纳兰琼瑶为妃，但琼瑶为争取婚姻自由离家出走，康熙亦乐得不用成婚。后来康熙微服下江南，却偶遇女扮男装的琼瑶...

programme.title: 头文字 D
programme.desc: 本片由日本同名殿堂级漫画改编而成。故事描述十八岁的拓海，每天驾驶着父亲残旧的汽车送递豆腐，却无意中练得一手出神入化的飘移技术。拓海被父亲怂恿参加山路赛，竟在众人错愕之下胜出，一夜成名，之后更面对一连串惊险绝伦的挑战赛！

programme.title: 油鬼子
programme.desc: 故事描述沈元（李修贤）亡父与林亚峇（谷峰）为生死之交。沈父临终前，曾在林之背上刺有神秘图案，而此图实是一道有特殊功能的符。后林为保护女儿中月（陈萍）而杀人，被判死刑；林被处死前，着沈把图案描下，以备不时之须。沈按图文指示，化身成威力无穷的油鬼子，帮助过不少人，亦铲除不少坏人，但最终却陷入疯狂状态。

programme.title: Shnitzel Quits
programme.desc: When Shnitzel feels that he is not getting enough of what he deserves he quites and leaves all of them. Later Shnitzel finds an job at Endive's. But Mung tries to get Shnitzel back.

programme.title: Banned From The Stand
programme.desc: Gazpacho tries to convince Mung to prove that he is right, but Mung refuses, so he restricts everybody from his stand until it becomes a problem.

programme.title: Creme Puff Hands
programme.desc: Chowder's hand inflates from misdirections, and it becomes helpful to the city at first, but then it becomes dangerous to the city. It also becomes a liability.

programme.title: Vote Sunny
programme.desc: Adventures with music superstar Sunny Bridges and his class.

programme.title: Two To Tango
programme.desc: Adventures with music superstar Sunny Bridges and his class.

programme.title: Home Part 1
programme.desc: Li'l D is crushed when his idol Sunny Bridges goes missing.

programme.title: Henny Penny
programme.desc: It's election time in the barnyard and Henny Penny has the whole flock in an uproar because she thinks the sky is falling!

programme.title: The Frog Princess
programme.desc: A frog princess teaches her human Prince that love can overcome adversity and change perceptions, if you give it a chance.

programme.title: Omni-Tricked
programme.desc: Ben's holiday to Portland is cut short when he discovers an 11th alien while battling a Dr. Animo Mega-Creature and damages his Omnitrix in a fight.

programme.title: Out To Launch
programme.desc: While on a visit to Cape Canaveral, the Tennyson Trio attends the inaugural launch of an experimental space plane. When Vilgax commandeers the ship, Ben must stop him from weaponising the shuttle.

programme.title: The Meach Harvest
programme.desc: Mung has to make a dish that requires a fruit that he fears, so he sends Chowder and Shnitzel to get the fruit.

programme.title: Shnitzel Quits
programme.desc: When Shnitzel feels that he is not getting enough of what he deserves he quites and leaves all of them. Later Shnitzel finds an job at Endive's. But Mung tries to get Shnitzel back.

programme.title: Banned From The Stand
programme.desc: Gazpacho tries to convince Mung to prove that he is right, but Mung refuses, so he restricts everybody from his stand until it becomes a problem.

programme.title: Creme Puff Hands
programme.desc: Chowder's hand inflates from misdirections, and it becomes helpful to the city at first, but then it becomes dangerous to the city. It also becomes a liability.

programme.title: Speaking Truth
programme.desc: Will alienates himself from the Bel-Air basketball team and finds appealing opportunities in love and basketball with the help of some new South LA friends.

programme.title: Cabin Fever
programme.desc: The chefs head to the mountains, a few hours outside of Los Angeles to go to Summer Camp where they are challenged to an outdoor grilling Quickfire for Padma and "Top Chef" Kentucky winner Kelsey Barnard Clark. Before the sun rises, the chefs get to work on an upscale brunch buffet for 200 moms vacationing at the camp using a very limited stock pantry.

programme.title: Vote Sunny
programme.desc: Adventures with music superstar Sunny Bridges and his class.

programme.title: Two To Tango
programme.desc: Adventures with music superstar Sunny Bridges and his class.

programme.title: How To Train Your Dragon: The Hidden World
programme.desc: Faced with an impending threat unlike others, Hiccup and Toothless battle to protect all that they love with a female Light Fury as they travel to a mythical hidden world.

programme.title: An American Girl: Chrissa Stands Strong
programme.desc: When Chrissa moves to a new school in the middle of the year, she is greeted by the girls in her fourth-grade class with teasing and tricks.

programme.title: Can I Keep It?
programme.desc: After stumbling upon a cute cat-dog-rabbit creature hybrid, or 'Cadobbit', Ben ignores Grandpa Max's advice and sneaks the animal onto the Rustbucket, but is soon in over his head as it turns on him.

programme.title: Battle At Biggie Box
programme.desc: Ben and Billy Billions go head-to-head over a Sumo Slammer Set sold exclusively inside the world's largest shopping centre, only to find six-year-old Simon Sez has gotten to it first.

programme.title: Bon Voyage
programme.desc: Aboard the SS Pettigrew on its final voyage, Ben must battle seasickness as well as Steam Smythe, who looks to use his mechanical creatures to sink the steamship's modern replacement.

programme.title: The 11th Alien, Part 1
programme.desc: With new Omni-Enhancements in tow, Ben plans on saving a town from a sudden mudslide, but his heroics are short-lived once Vilgax appears to warn him about the Omnitrix's mysterious new alien.

programme.title: The 11th Alien, Part 2
programme.desc: After discovering that Vilgax has joined forces with the Weatherheads, Ben must not only overcome his doubts, but must also fully embrace his new powers if he is to beat his foes.

programme.title: The Arborians
programme.desc: Chowder and the gang must get syrup for a recipe.

programme.title: The Garage Sale
programme.desc: Chowder resorts to drastic measures to save all his precious junk.

programme.title: The Fire Breather
programme.desc: After eating a bunch of fiery-hot peppers Chowder starts to breathe fire whenever he opens his mouth.

programme.title: The Flying Flinger Lingons
programme.desc: Chowder becomes obsessed with the idea of joining a bouncy group.

programme.title: Panini For President
programme.desc: Panini runs in an election in Marzipan City.

programme.title: Home Part 2
programme.desc: The class decide to raise money to pay for a music teacher.

programme.title: Peanuts Get Yer Peanuts
programme.desc: The class express themselves in the annual Peanut Pageant.

programme.title: The Devil And Li'l D
programme.desc: Li'l D dreams of signing a record deal come true.

programme.title: I Wish I Could Find Her
programme.desc: Ruby helps a wisher find a very special someone.

programme.title: We Bare Bears: The Movie
programme.desc: When the bears' love of food trucks and viral videos gets out of hand, the menacing Agent Trout from the National Wildlife Control pledges to restore the 'natural order' by separating them forever.

programme.title: Bad News Bears
programme.desc: A hot-headed baseball coach finds his work cut out when he takes upon a new coaching assignment with a team that is way below par.

programme.title: Compromised
programme.desc: When Ashley's favorite teacher is fired, Will goes to great lengths to help her out and leaves Carlton in an uncomfortable position.

programme.title: Superman
programme.desc: A Superman who's driven by compassion and an inherent belief in the goodness of humankind.

programme.title: Colossal Coliseum Kaiseki
programme.desc: With only six chefs remaining, the challenges get even more difficult, when pastry super-chef Sherry Yard awaits the All Stars for a dreaded dessert Quickfire, made even more impossible when chefs must endure a blindfolded taste test to pick their ingredients. Then Michelin-starred Chefs/Restaurateurs Niki and Carole Lidi-Nakayama demonstrate a traditional Japanese Kaiseki meal, the ultimate in simplicity, restraint and precision.

programme.desc: Journalist Lisa Millar is in the kitchen and together they make a beautiful salmon poke bowl, before exploring pumpkin spice flavours to change Lisa's mind on American "fall".

programme.title: The Pacific (2026)
programme.desc: The Pacific region is rich with culture, people and stories. Johnson Raela and Alice Lolohea bring you the stories that matter to the Pacific and the most up-to-date information, from journalists with deep regional expertise.

programme.title: Round 10 - Brisbane Lions v Geelong Cats
programme.desc: ABC Australia brings you Australian Rules football live in your lounge room every week with coverage of the 2026 AFL Premiership Season.

programme.title: Boxing Day Tsunami
programme.desc: A massive earthquake below the Indian Ocean unleashed the deadliest tsunami in history, killing 230,000 people. Those who were swept up in the wave had no idea of its scale, only of the devastation that unfolded before them.

programme.title: Ambulance Australia S4
programme.desc: The dreaded Friday night shift sees Queensland Ambulance pushed to the limits as they try to unravel mystery upon medical emergency.

programme.title: ABC Late News (2026)
programme.desc: End your day with the latest on the day's top stories. ABC News has reporters across Australia and around the globe to uncover what's happening and why it matters. Presented by Michael Tetlow in Perth.

programme.title: The Business (2026)
programme.desc: Australia's leading daily business and finance show, bringing you up to date on market moves, economic trends and the forces affecting consumers, investors, employees and businesses big and small. Presented by Alicia Barry.

At the special later time of 8pm, Sarah Ferguson presents Australia's premier daily current affairs program, including reaction and analysis after Opposition Leader Angus Taylor delivers his Budget Reply.

programme.title: The World (2026)
programme.desc: There's never been a more important time to stay in touch with what's happening in our world. Girish Sawlani presents the latest international news from ABC News correspondents as well as interviews with experts and guests.

programme.title: 幸福来了
programme.desc: 高家兄弟因为价值观截然不同，不但成就高低立判，连教育出来的子女，个性和品格也大相径庭。上一代有上一代的恩怨情报，下一代有下一代的追求展望；在错综复杂的人生大道上，每个人都汲汲营营，寻找着属于自己的幸福课题。

programme.title: 多情城市
programme.desc: 以1960至1970年代九份为背景，述说三个拜把兄弟如何赤手空拳打天下，藉由上一代的爱情故事串连两代之间共同的情感与记忆，深度探索两代之间的价值观差异。

programme.title: 市井豪门
